Lore Item No Trade
Slot: WAIST
AC: 10
STR: +10 DEX: +10 WIS: +10 AGI: +10

Item Type:Armor

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50

a malevolent banshee

# May 12 2001 at 12:39 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
2nd highest starting wisdom of all shaman races.
No faction problems
Lowest XP penalty of all shaman races
Best newbie area in the game. (IMO anyway)
Able to wear plate class armor


I wouldn't say they suck as shaman

3rd best warrior in the game going by only stats, and once again, if you don't want to play an evil race, then they are the #1 choice.


Guess they don't suck as warriors either.
